mapper.insert: INSERT INTO space(space_key, space_title, space_order, space_status, image_no) VALUES (#{spaceKey}, #{spaceTitle}, seq_space_order.nextVal, #{spaceStatus}, 1)
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM space_members WHERE space_key IN ( SELECT space_key FROM space_members WHERE user_role = '관리자' AND user_no = #{userNo} )
mapper.update: UPDATE space SET space_title = #{spaceDto.spaceTitle, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, space_status = #{spaceDto.spaceStatus, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, image_no = #{spaceDto.imageNo, jdbcType=NUMERIC} WHERE space_key IN ( SELECT space_key FROM space_members WHERE user_role = '관리자' AND user_no = #{userNo} ) AND space_key = #{spaceDto.spaceKey}
mapper.select: SELECT sm.space_key "spaceKey", s.space_title "spaceTitle", s.image_no "imageNo" FROM space_members sm INNER JOIN space s ON sm.space_key = s.space_key WHERE sm.user_no = #{userNo} ORDER BY s.space_order
SELECT space_key "spaceKey", space_title "spaceTitle", space_status "spaceStatus", image_no "imageNo" FROM space WHERE space_key = #{spaceKey}
